L

Gateway

System / Location · First seen 3307-05-20 · 13 mentions
EDSM ↗ Inara ↗
Active: 3307-05-20 → 3309-10-31
System Overview

Gateway is a heavily populated Alliance system governed corporately under the Alliance Office of Statistics, with a refinery-based economy supported by agricultural output. Its population of over 400 million makes it one of the most significant Alliance systems outside the core Old Worlds cluster.

The system rose to galactic prominence in 3307 as the logistics hub for Prime Minister Edmund Mahon's re-election expansion programme. Pilots delivered industrial materials and mined tritium to Dublin Citadel in Gateway to fund construction of new Alliance starports in LHS 2522 and the Sharru Sector. The campaign became controversial when Councillor Nakato Kaine revealed irregularities and alleged that Sirius Corporation had made unregistered donations to cover shortfalls — foreshadowing later concerns about corporate influence over Alliance policy.

Gateway is also home to Gateway Laboratories, a major xenological research facility. In 3309, Dr Maximo Fonseca of Gateway Laboratories took the lead on Aegis's Thargoid research, contributing to the development of the caustic sink launcher that enabled pilots to survive longer inside Maelstrom caustic clouds. The system's dual role as both a political campaign hub and a scientific research centre underscores its strategic importance to the Alliance.

System Data
Coordinates: [-11, 77.84375, -0.875]
Allegiance: Alliance
Government: Corporate
Security: Medium
Economy: Refinery
Population: 400.0M
Controlling Faction: Alliance Office of Statistics

Mentions Timeline (18 articles)
3309-10-31
Aegis Prioritises Research into Thargoid Spire Sites
Aegis prioritises research into rapidly evolving Thargoid spire sites, with Fonseca theorising about their purpose and Palin requesting samples.
3309-10-05
Aegis Produces Sub-Surface Extraction Missiles
Aegis deploys sub-surface extraction missiles to rescue captives from Thargoid Titans, with Tanner explaining the dangerous extraction process.
3309-09-28
Deliver Resources for Extraction Missile Manufacture
Aegis requests materials for mass production of sub-surface extraction missiles to rescue humans from Titans, with Aisling Duval urging families to hold onto hope.
3309-03-02
Caustic Sink Launcher Aids Maelstrom Exploration
Aegis begins production of the caustic sink launcher, enabling longer survival in Maelstrom caustic clouds; next priority is the energy surge at Maelstrom centers.
3309-02-06
Mahon: ‘Alliance Will Support Aegis’
The Alliance Assembly votes to commit ships, resources and personnel to Aegis if the tri-superpower agency is reformed.
3308-06-09
Thargoid Research Project Phase Two Begins
Professor Ishmael Palin launches phase two of his Thargoid research project, requesting fresh alien artefacts for study.
3308-03-10
Colonia Bridge Reaches Completion
The Colonia Bridge project concludes successfully with all starport services installed.
3308-01-28
New Starports Created for Colonia Bridge
Six new starports are completed along the Colonia Bridge travel corridor.
3307-07-23
New Onionhead Variant Reaches the Market
Onionhead gamma strain (helix) enters the market in selected industrial anarchy systems. Journalist Adalyn Cross reports it is marketed for medicinal use but remains illegal outside anarchy jurisdictions. Concerns arise about Sirius Corporation potentially ferrying shipments via its freight network, which the company denies.
3307-06-25
New Alliance Starports Become Operational
Two new Alliance stations — Enterprise Market in LHS 2522 and Prosperity Core in Sharru Sector FW-W c1-19 — become operational. Prime Minister Mahon welcomes visitors while Councillor Kaine reveals irregularities in the tritium campaign and alleges Sirius Corporation made unregistered donations to make up shortfalls.
3307-06-03
Tritium Mining Campaign Boosts Alliance Expansion
Prime Minister Mahon's tritium mining campaign concludes successfully. New Alliance starports will be constructed in the LHS 2522 and Sharru Sector FW-W c1-19 systems by June 25th. Pilots who contributed can collect rewards from Dublin Citadel.
3307-05-27
Tritium Mining Marks Alliance Election Day
On Alliance election day, Prime Minister Mahon launches a tritium mining initiative to fuel construction of up to five new Alliance starports. The initiative follows his successful industrial materials drive. Opinion polls predict Mahon will comfortably win re-election.
3307-05-20
Alliance Election Candidates Announce Community Drives
Prime Minister Mahon and Councillor Kaine launch rival delivery initiatives in Alliance space. Mahon focuses on industrial materials for expansion while Kaine aims to boost local manufacturing and trade. The winner will run a second campaign the following week.
3307-03-25
Medicines Delivered for Starport Bombing Survivors
*Pilots Federation ALERT* Safeguard Interstellar has successfully received medical supplies for civilians wounded during The NMLA terrorist attack.
3307-03-18
Medical Supplies Needed for Starport Bombing Survivors
*Pilots Federation ALERT* Safeguard Interstellar requires deliveries of medicines to treat casualties from The NMLA’s recent terrorist attack.
3307-03-17
Anti-NMLA Intelligence Unit Formed
The Alliance, Empire and Federation have created a centralised agency dedicated to investigating and eliminating the NMLA paramilitary group.
3307-03-15
Superpowers Respond to ‘Nine Martyrs’ Attack
Political fallout has been intense after The NMLA simultaneously bombed nine starports in the Alliance, Empire and Federation.
3307-03-12
Starport Bombing Casualties Include Federal Vice President
Vice President Brad Mitchell and a number of Federal Cabinet members have been killed in The recent terrorist attack on a starport orbiting Earth.
